app.title: MoneySaver
app.welcome: Welcome to MoneySaver! Your partner in financial management.
app.WaitingDisclaimer: Due to server limitations for this portfolio version, the first request to the system may take between 30 seconds and 1 minute. Thank you for your patience.

signUp.title: Sign up
signUp.welcome: Sign up to manage your finances
signUp.success: Welcome, {{name}}! Please verify your email to continue.

forgotPassword.title: Password Recovery
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email to receive the verification code.

auth.forgotDescription: To recover your password, a verification code has been sent to your email.
auth.signUpDescription: To complete your registration, a verification code has been sent to your email.
auth.loginDescription: To complete your login, a verification code has been sent to your email.
auth.length: The code must be 6 digits long
auth.verificationError: Verification error. Please check your code and try again.

resetPassword.title: Change Password
resetPassword.description: Enter your new password. You will be redirected to the login page.
resetPassword.success: Password changed successfully, please log in.
resetPassword.error: Error changing password. Please try again.

errors.passwordLength: The password must be at least 8 characters long
errors.passwordChars: The password must contain at least one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one number
errors.otpContent: The content must be numeric only

passwordRequirements.length: The password must be at least 8 characters long
passwordRequirements.uppercase: The password must contain at least one uppercase letter
passwordRequirements.lowercase: The password must contain at least one lowercase letter
passwordRequirements.number: The password must contain at least one number

modify.title: Modify Profile
modify.error: Error updating profile. Please try again.

dialog.title: Confirm Profile Update
dialog.description: Are you sure you want to update your profile? This action will update your personal information.

delete.title: Delete Account
delete.success: Account deleted successfully. Come back soon!
delete.error: Error deleting account. Please try again.

dialog.title: Confirm Account Deletion
dialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete your account? This action is irreversible and will delete your account and all associated data. You will need to verify your email.

confirm.title: Authenticate to Delete Your Account
confirm.description: Enter the code sent to your email to confirm the deletion of your account.

extract.title: Extract Transactions
extract.description: Extract your latest transactions from a bank account over a period of time.
extract.noTransactionsFound: No pending transactions found for this period.

add.title: Add Transactions
add.description: Add the category you want to associate it with and the establishment if you wish.

minDate.currentMonth: Minimum date must be from the current month
minDate.cannotBeAfterMaxDate: Minimum date cannot be after maximum date

maxDate.future: Maximum date cannot be in the future

add.title: Add Goal
add.description: Create a new savings goal. Set the maximum amount you want to spend in a category.
add.tableCaption: List of your current savings goals

edit.title: Edit Goal
edit.description: Update the information of the goals or delete them.
edit.error: Error updating goal. Please try again.

dialog.title: Confirm Update
dialog.description: Are you sure you want to update the goal {{name}}?

dialog.title: Confirm Delete
dialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete the goal {{name}}?

view.title: View Goals
view.description: Check the summary of your goals by month.
view.tableCaption: List of your savings goals for {{month}}/{{year}}
view.stats: In the month {{month}}/{{year}} you have completed {{goalsBelow100}} of {{totalGoals}} goals.

add.description: Create a new spending category. The name must be unique among active categories.
add.error: Error creating category. Please check the fields and try again.
add.duplicateError: An active category with that name already exists.

modify.description: Modify the name or icon of the category you want. This change will not affect already registered expenses or the total spending. Or delete the category, all expenses in that category will be removed.
modify.tableCaption: List of your current spending categories
modify.error: Error modifying category. Please check the fields and try again.

dialog.title: Confirm Modification
dialog.description: Are you sure you want to modify the category {{icon}}{{name}} to {{newIcon}}{{newName}}?

delete.description: Delete the category you want. This action will remove all expenses in that category.
delete.tableCaption: List of your current spending categories
delete.error: Error deleting category. Please try again.

dialog.title: Confirm Deletion
dialog.description: Are you sure you want to delete the category {{icon}}{{name}}? All associated goals and expenses will be removed.

add.description: Register a new expense through the form or by importing the receipt, invoice, or any similar document. In this portfolio version, file processing is simulated to avoid costs associated with AI.
add.currentMonth: The expense must correspond to the current month.
add.error: Error registering expense. Please check the fields and try again.
add.success: Registered {{name}} with an amount of {{amount}}€ in the category {{category}}
add.mockFileProcessed: To avoid costs in this portfolio version, the file processing is simulated.
add.fileError: Error processing file. Please try again.

view.title: View spendings
view.description: Check your spendings by month and sort them as you wish.

amount.positive: The amount must be a positive number

date.currentMonth: Date must be from the current month

expirationDate.future: Expiration day must be later than today
expirationDate.sameDay: Day of expiration must be the same as the day of the spending

token.errorRefresh: Session token has expired. Please log in again.

account.title: Bank accounts
account.noAccountsFound: No bank accounts found to link.

page.title: View bank accounts
page.description: Check your linked bank accounts, add new ones, or remove existing ones.

delete.error: Error unlinking account. Please try again.

table.caption: List of your linked bank accounts

dialog.title: Unlink account
dialog.description: Are you sure you want to unlink the account {{name}}?

errors.duplicateAccount: The bank account is already linked.

view.title: View charts
view.description: Showing the monthly summary by categories corresponding to {{month}}/{{year}}.

compare.title: Compare charts
compare.description: Compare your monthly expenses by category. Select different dates.

manageAccounts.title: Manage bank accounts
manageAccounts.description: Add new bank accounts or remove existing ones.

createGoal.title: Add saving goal
createGoal.description: Set a saving goal and start saving.

editGoals.title: Edit saving goal
editGoals.description: Modify the details of your saving goal.

editCategory.title: Edit category
editCategory.description: Update the details of an existing category or delete it.

viewCharts.title: View charts
viewCharts.description: Visualize your monthly expenses through different charts.

compareCharts.title: Compare charts
compareCharts.description: Compare your monthly expenses across different categories.
